diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/Tests/SCM-Service/ServicePages.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/Tests/SCM-Service/ServicePages.Codeunit.al
index bc269dae..77b6afc0 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/Tests/SCM-Service/ServicePages.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/Tests/SCM-Service/ServicePages.Codeunit.al
@@ -1207,4 +1207,34 @@ codeunit 136150 "Service Pages"
     begin
         PostandSendConfirmation.Yes().Invoke();
     end;
+
+    [Test]
+    [HandlerFunctions('ServiceOrderReportHandler')]
+    [Scope('OnPrem')]
+    procedure PrintServiceOrderWithWorkDescriptionFromPage()
+    var
+        ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
+        ServDocumentPrint: Codeunit "Serv. Document Print";
+    begin
+        // [FEATURE] [Print] [Order] [Work Description]
+        // [SCENARIO] Printing service order with work description from page should not fail with write transaction error
+        Initialize();
+
+        // [GIVEN] Service Order with item service line and work description
+        LibraryService.CreateServiceDocumentWithItemServiceLine(ServiceHeader, ServiceHeader."Document Type"::Order);
+        ServiceHeader.SetWorkDescription('Test Work Description');
+
+        // [WHEN] Print the service order (simulating page action where Modify creates write transaction)
+        // Note: SetWorkDescription does a Modify() which starts a write transaction
+        // The fix adds Commit() before REPORT.RunModal when IsGUI=true to close the transaction
+        ServDocumentPrint.PrintServiceHeader(ServiceHeader);
+
+        // [THEN] No error is thrown (the fix commits before showing report dialog)
+    end;
+
+    [ReportHandler]
+    [Scope('OnPrem')]
+    procedure ServiceOrderReportHandler(var ServiceOrder: Report "Service Order")
+    begin
+    end;
 }
